description: ASP.NET Metrics Dashboard for monitoring ASP.NET Core applications instrumented with OpenTelemetry .NET SDK. Covers application performance, request/response metrics, and process/runtime metrics including GC and thread monitoring.
title: ASP.NET (OTEL)

variables.name: deployment_environment
variables.label: Deployment Environment
variables.query: SELECT DISTINCT deployment_environment FROM metrics WHERE metric_name IN ('process.cpu.usage','http.server.request.duration') ORDER BY deployment_environment

variables.name: service_name
variables.label: Service Name
variables.query: SELECT DISTINCT service_name FROM metrics WHERE metric_name IN ('process.cpu.usage','http.server.request.duration') ORDER BY service_name

widgets.description: Current CPU usage of the ASP.NET application process
widgets.title: CPU Usage

widgets.description: Memory usage of the ASP.NET application process
widgets.title: Memory Usage

widgets.description: Current number of active requests being processed
widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.description: Current number of threads in the process
widgets.title: Thread Count

widgets.description: HTTP server request latency - p50, p95, and p99 percentiles
widgets.title: Request Latency (p50, p95, p99)

widgets.description: HTTP error rate by status code
widgets.title: Error Rate (4xx, 5xx)

widgets.description: Number of active HTTP requests over time
widgets.title: Active Requests

widgets.description: Number of threads in the process over time
widgets.title: Thread Count
